data.body: PRODUCTION CUTOVER DONE (JoeOakhartNava admin). Live refs/meta/config pushed 71ee442..1ef2cad; REST GET /a/projects/rebar/config now reports submit_type=FAST_FORWARD_ONLY. Pre-diff confirmed the ONLY live-vs-repo delta was the [submit] block (no drift clobbered). BACK-OUT: restore submit_type by pushing project.config with 'action = merge if necessary' to refs/meta/config (prior live meta SHA 71ee442c06edc267b7099b0b2182d199194f9988). NOTE: FFO is now enforced for ALL sessions — any in-flight change whose base is behind main is now non-submittable until rebased/re-merged onto the tip (which re-runs CI on the landing tree = R5).
